task_objective: Fix confirmed defects from retroactive agy thermo-nuclear reviews (review-followup-fixes)

findings_fixed.description: saveCurrent's error handling (try/catch + toastError) was dropped during the components-tsx-decomposition move. removeCurrent was also unguarded (pre-existing). applyResult had try/finally but no catch, so errors were swallowed.
findings_fixed.fix: saveCurrent: added if(busy) return; setBusy(true); wrapped body in try/catch(toastError('Save failed'))/finally{setBusy(false)}. applyResult: added catch clause with toastError('Fetch failed'). removeCurrent: same full busy+try/catch/finally pattern with toastError('Remove failed').

findings_fixed.description: _sanitize_steam_news: the inline fallback `if not image_sources: image_sources = self._steam_news_image_candidates(raw_body_source, 0)` was dropped when _collected_steam_news_image_sources() was introduced. News items whose images live only in the raw body now return no images.
findings_fixed.fix: Restored the two-line fallback immediately after image_sources = self._collected_steam_news_image_sources(item). raw_body_source already in scope.
findings_fixed.tdd: tests/test_steam_news_image_fallback.py: item with empty image/image_url/image_sources/preview_image_url but body containing [img]...[/img]. Asserted red before fix, green after.

findings_fixed.description: Plugin._run_scan_pipeline had resolver: Any / saver: Any; ScanPipelineResult.status was str.
findings_fixed.fix: resolver -> Callable[[ScanPipelineTarget], ScanPipelineResult]; saver -> Callable[[int, dict[str, Any]], Awaitable[None]]. ScanPipelineResult.status -> Literal['matched', 'miss']. Added Callable, Awaitable to main.py typing imports; Literal to backend/scan_runner.py. Annotation-only.

deferred_items: epochToDate duplication (subjective quality nit, out of scope)
_plog callback duplication across backend/ modules (subjective, out of scope)
status/source further Literal on source (out of scope per plan)
commits: test(steam-news): add red regression test for body-fallback image sources
fix(frontend): restore busy guard + try/catch/finally to saveCurrent, removeCurrent, applyResult
fix(backend): restore Steam-news body-fallback for image_sources
build: rebuild dist after frontend error-handling restoration

quality_gates.pytest: PASS (all 116 tests including new regression test)

results: All three confirmed defects fixed. Test red->green confirmed for the body-fallback. Type annotations are annotation-only with no runtime changes. dist rebuilt. Working tree clean.
